_comment: Issue #1 — recording-bucket lifecycle. Source of truth for the GCS recordings bucket. 0-14d Standard, 15-60d Nearline, delete at 60d. Apply with apply-lifecycle.sh. Nearline has a 30-day minimum storage duration; moving to Nearline at age 14 and deleting at age 60 leaves a 46-day Nearline window, so there is no early-deletion fee.
